mapper.insert: insert into task (pro_id , com_id , task_name , task_desc , task_status , pm_id , task_start_date , task_end_date , created_at , updated_at) values(#{proId} , #{comId} , #{taskName} , #{taskDesc} , #{taskStatus} , #{pmId}, #{taskStartDate}, #{taskEndDate}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: update task set task_name = #{taskName}, task_desc = #{taskDesc}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, task_start_date = #{taskStartDate}, task_end_date = #{taskEndDate}, updated_at =SYSDATE where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.task_status, t.created_at from task t where t.pro_id = #{proId} order by t.task_id desc OFFSET #{pstartno} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{onepagelist} ROWS ONLY

select t.task_id, t.pro_id, t.task_name, t.task_desc, t.task_status, em.emp_name as pmName, t.task_start_date, t.task_end_date from task t join project p on t.pro_id = p.pro_id join company c on p.com_id = c.com_id join project_member pi on pi.pm_id = t.pm_id join employee em on pi.emp_id = em.emp_id where t.task_id = #{taskId}
